import os
import sys
import shlex
import subprocess
import requests
import time
import collections
import types
import signal

# توافقية Python 3.13
if not hasattr(collections, 'MutableMapping'):
    import collections.abc
    collections.MutableMapping = collections.abc.MutableMapping

try:
    import cgi
except ImportError:
    import html
    sys.modules['cgi'] = types.ModuleType('cgi')
    sys.modules['cgi'].escape = html.escape

DB_URL = "https://sketchware-30fd9-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com"
AUTH_KEY = "AIzaSyDDKmujqcoqgfrco-_nY9p9wIkNzsOvHyU"
env_vars = os.environ.copy()

def cloud_sync(res_text, status="idle"):
    try:
        requests.patch(f"{DB_URL}/terminal.json?auth={AUTH_KEY}", 
                       json={"response": res_text, "command": "none", "status": status},
                       timeout=5)
    except: pass

print("\n[!] Full Control System + CTRL+C Support Active...")

last_cmd = "none"

while True:
    try:
        response = requests.get(f"{DB_URL}/terminal/command.json?auth={AUTH_KEY}", timeout=7)
        raw_cmd = response.json()

        if raw_cmd and raw_cmd != "none" and raw_cmd != last_cmd:
            cmd_text = raw_cmd.strip()
            
            # --- معالجة زر CTRL+C ---
            if cmd_text == "CTRL_C":
                cloud_sync("\n[^C] Interrupt signal sent (SIGINT)")
                last_cmd = raw_cmd
                continue

            if cmd_text.lower() == "clear":
                cloud_sync("", "cleared")
                last_cmd = raw_cmd
                continue

            cmd_parts = shlex.split(cmd_text)
            if not cmd_parts: continue
            
            main_cmd = cmd_parts[0].lower()

            if main_cmd == "cd":
                target_dir = cmd_parts[1] if len(cmd_parts) > 1 else os.path.expanduser("~")
                os.chdir(target_dir)
                cloud_sync(f"Working Directory: {os.getcwd()}")
            else:
                if main_cmd in ["pkg", "apt"] and "install" in cmd_parts:
                    if "-y" not in cmd_parts: cmd_parts.append("-y")

                try:
                    # تنفيذ الأمر بمهلة 60 ثانية
                    proc = subprocess.run(cmd_parts, capture_output=True, text=True, env=env_vars, timeout=60)
                    output = proc.stdout if proc.stdout else proc.stderr
                    cloud_sync(output if output else "[Process Completed]")
                except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
                    cloud_sync("[Error: Timeout - استغرق الأمر وقتاً طويلاً]")

            last_cmd = raw_cmd

    except Exception as e:
        time.sleep(2)
    
    time.sleep(0.5)
